nasb.text: If the Lord had not been my help, My soul would soon have dwelt in the abode of silence.

esv.text: If the Lord had not been my help, my soul would soon have lived in the land of silence.

cnv.text: 如果不是耶和華幫助我， 我早就不在人世了。

ccb.text: 耶和华若不帮助我， 我早已归入死亡的沉寂中了。

csbs.text: 要不是耶和华帮助我， 我的灵魂早就归入寂静之地了。
